query:
CREATE TABLE `communityComments` (
	`id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`postId` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `communityComments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `communityPosts` (
	`id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`postType` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	`likesCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`commentsCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `communityPosts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `debts` (
	`id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`name` text NOT NULL,
	`originalAmount` int NOT NULL,
	`currentAmount` int NOT NULL,
	`interestRate` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
	`minimumPayment` int NOT NULL,
	`dueDate` varchar(10),
	`type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`strategy` varchar(20),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `debts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `investments` (
	`id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`platform` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`assetName` text NOT NULL,
	`assetType` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`currentValue` int NOT NULL,
	`purchasePrice` int NOT NULL,
	`quantity` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`purchaseDate` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `investments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `ritualCompletions` (
	`id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`ritualName` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`completedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `ritualCompletions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
